title: Axe and Star Throwing
description:
This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used indoors where there is lots of space and Outdoors.

The Axe and Star throwing set can be enjoyed by +12.

The set arrives with:
Steel Frame and target
8 plastic stars, 4 blue 4 red
8 plastic axes, 4 blue 4 red

Dimensions: H 152 x W 61 x D 84 cm

title: The Giant Connect 4
description:
This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used indoors and Outdoors (weather permitting).
Ideal for all ages.

Arrives with:
Quick Release Slider
21 Red rings
21 White rings

Game size
120 x 43 x 104 cm

title: The Giant Chess
description:
This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used indoors and Outdoors (weather permitting) on a table, the grass – a flat surface is required.

The Garden Chess set can be enjoyed by all age groups.

The set arrives with:
1 chess matt
32 pieces, ranging in sizes from 4in to 8.5in tall

Game size
3ft by 3ft

title: The Garden Noughts and Crosses Set
description:
This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used indoors and Outdoors (weather permitting) on a table or the grass – a flat surface is required.

The Garden N&C set can be enjoyed by all age groups.

The set arrives with:
1 set of foam interlocking squares
4 noughts
4 crosses

Game size
3ft by 3ft

title: The Garden Dominos Set
description:
This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used indoors and Outdoors (weather permitting) on a table or the grass or any flat surface.

The Garden Dominos set can be enjoyed by all age groups.

The set arrives with:
1 set of foam Dominos

Game size
Each piece 7in long and 4in wide and 1in thick

title: The Boules Set
description:
This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used Outdoors (weather permitting).
Only suitable to use on sand or grass.
The Boules set is for adults.

The set arrives with:
1 bag
4 blue and 4 white boules
1 target ball

Game size
Each piece 7in long and 4in wide and 1in thick

title: The Set of 6 Croquet Lawn Set
description:
Game for up to 6 players. Easy to set up on any soft ground surface.
Game for all ages and skill level.

Arrives with:
6 mallets
6 matching coloured balls
Hoops

Game size
Game can be set up to any size

title: The Giant Ring Toss
description:
Easy large garden game suitable for all skill levels.
Suitable for anyone over 12 years old. Younger players must be supervised.
Comes with rope and plastic rings.

Arrives with:
Boards with various scoring opportunities
Rope rings, red and blue
Plastic rings, red and blue

title: The Bean Bag Toss
description:
Solid wood Bag toss games. This set is ideal for parties and weddings.
Can be used indoors and Outdoors (weather permitting).
Ideal for all ages.

Arrives with:
2 matching Bag toss frames
8 bean bags – 2 colours

title: The Giant Checkers Set
description:
Game for 2 players. Easy to set up on any flat surface and table.
Game for all ages and skill level.

Arrives with:
1 game matt
12 white wooden discs
12 black wooden discs

Game size
91cm x 91cm
